hotel_profile.short_description: Beachfront resort in South Al Sharqiah, Oman, in a quiet area on the road toward Masirah and Duqm.
hotel_profile.long_description: Al Ashkhara Beach Resort is positioned directly on the beach in a calm setting away from noise. The location is known for attractive beaches, moderate weather, and seasonal wind and water activities.

location.road_context: On the coastal road linking Al Ashkhara, Mahoot, Masirah route, and Duqm industrial area.

brochure_rates.tour_operator_discount_note: Up to 15% discount from rack rate.
Up to 15% discount from rack rate.

room_types.name: Suite Room
room_types.view: Balcony (view not explicitly priced by view type)
room_types.occupancy_note: Up to 3 adults, or 2 adults + up to 3 children.

brochure_rates.tour_operator_discount_note: Up to 15% discount from rack rate.

room_types.name: Small Apartment
room_types.occupancy_note: Up to 3 adults, or 2 adults + up to 3 children.

brochure_rates.tour_operator_discount_note: Up to 15% discount from rack rate.

STANDARD_SUPERIOR.summary: Suite-style bedroom with spacious balcony and sea view.

STANDARD_EXECUTIVE.summary: Suite-style bedroom with spacious balcony and non-sea-view orientation.

SUITE_ROOM.summary: Bedroom plus seating room, attached bath, and balcony for family stays.
features: A/C in bedroom and seating room

SMALL_APARTMENT.summary: Suite bedroom plus seating room, pantry, and balcony.

general: Quiet setting away from city noise
Function hall for meetings and presentations
recreation_facilities: Three swimming pools (two kids, one adults)
Billiards, table tennis, and hockey table

restaurant.description: Beachfront-view restaurant with three different halls; operates during meal timings.

lunch.notes: Set buffet options; special orders considered subject to availability.
menu_examples: Rice + Chicken or Fried Fish + Salad + Desserts + Soft Drinks + Water
Rice + Mutton or Fried Fish + Salad + Desserts + Soft Drinks + Water

dinner.notes: Served outdoors under pergola or in main hall depending on weather; special orders subject to availability.
menu_examples: Mixed grills: Half grilled chicken + mutton tikka + Arabic bread + salad + desserts + soft drinks + water
Mixed grills: Grilled fish + mutton tikka + Arabic bread + salad + desserts + soft drinks + water

restaurant.capacity_note: Restaurant can cater around 50 people at a time.

coffee_shop.description: Classic western-style coffee shop with sea-view window and outdoor pergola seating.
coffee_shop.brochure_rates_note: Rates are applied according to the available menu.

activities.name: Swimming Pools
activities.details: Three pools in total: two for kids and one for adults.

activities.name: Entertainment Center
activities.details: 10x5 meter hall with billiards, table tennis, and hockey table.

activities.name: Fishing Trips / Boat Tours
activities.details: Group or individual trips starting from Al Ashkhara fishermen's port.
activities.booking_note: Book one day in advance through hotel reception.

activities.name: Desert Bikes (Quad Riding)
activities.details: Riding on sand dunes and the beach.

activities.name: Fishing Rods / Lines
activities.details: Fishing tools available for guest use.

activities.name: Sports & Kids Activities
activities.details: Kids playground, football and volleyball areas around the resort.

activities.name: Omani Traditional Tent Experience
activities.details: Sunrise and sea-view experience with Omani coffee in Bedouin ambience.

activities.name: Private BBQ Sheds
activities.details: Private BBQ spaces; grills, charcoal, and accessories can be provided at cost.

activities.name: Kite Surfing Training Center (Seasonal)
activities.details: Operates in collaboration with a known school in Oman.
activities.season_window: Mid May to end of September

children_policy: Standard room: up to two children below 8 years allowed.
Suite room: up to three children allowed at room rate; extra child is 10 OMR, up to total 4 children.
extra_person_policy: Extra adult is 15 OMR; maximum total 3 adults in twin room without children.
Extra adult is 15 OMR; maximum total 4 adults in suite room.
rate_and_inventory_policy: Advertised room rates apply to selected dates only.
Rates are subject to availability and may change without prior notice.
Rooms may be limited on public holidays, school breaks, and weekends.
Rates are per room per night.
policies.tax_fee_note: Rates include service tax/service charges and/or other applicable local charges depending on locality.
changes_allowed: Guest name change allowed at least 3 days before check-in.
No other booking changes allowed; cancel and rebook if needed.

cancellation_policy.summary: Bookings are non-refundable within 3 days of check-in.
rules: Cancellation is allowed at least 3 days before scheduled check-in; cancellation fees apply.
For permitted cancellations, amount minus cancellation fee is credited to a credit shell for future bookings.
Credit is valid for 3 months from cancellation date, currency-specific, and non-transferable.
If cancelled less than 3 days before check-in, the total booking amount is forfeited.
Promotional bookings may be non-cancellable unless explicitly stated otherwise.

faq_seed.question: What room types are available?
faq_seed.answer: The resort offers Standard Superior Room, Standard Executive Room, Suite Room, and Small Apartment.

faq_seed.question: What are your meal timings?
faq_seed.answer: Restaurant timings are Breakfast 07:30-10:00, Lunch 13:00-16:00, and Dinner 19:00-21:30.

faq_seed.question: What activities are available?
faq_seed.answer: Activities include pools, entertainment center games, fishing/boat trips, desert bikes, sports areas, traditional tent experience, and private BBQ sheds.

faq_seed.question: Do you have a coffee shop?
faq_seed.answer: Yes, a western-style coffee shop serves espresso, americano, latte, and snacks from 10:00-22:00 with a 14:00-16:00 break.

faq_seed.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faq_seed.answer: Bookings are non-refundable within 3 days of check-in. Eligible earlier cancellations receive credit shell (minus fees), valid for 3 months.

faq_seed.question: How can I contact the resort?
faq_seed.answer: You can contact info@ashkhara.com or front desk numbers 25535666 / 255335999.
